items.title: Trump recommends Lindsey Graham's sister serve as interim senator for South Carolina
items.description: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

items.title: Paramount, WBD hit with lawsuit from 12 states, including California, to block merger
items.description: A group of states, including California, filed a lawsuit to block the merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery.

items.title: SpaceX stock sinks for a second-straight day, nearing $135 IPO price
items.description: SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO. Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week.

items.title: A July rate hike from the Fed? The odds are rising
items.description: Chances of a rate hike in July by the Federal Reserve rose as oil prices jumped on the latest developments in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy
items.description: The United States Oil Fund (USO), the ETF that best tracks oil prices, offers equity options traders a liquid, accessible alternative to the complexities of the futures market.

items.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
items.description: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

items.title: Trump calls for Congress to pass Clarity Act crypto bill to honor Lindsey Graham
items.description: The Senate Banking Committee approved the bill 15-9 in May, with two Democrats joining Republicans to advance the legislation.

items.title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
items.description: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare' fund that has since been scrapped.

items.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
items.description: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.

items.title: Waller says Fed shouldn't 'fight the last war' on inflation but warns hikes still possible
items.description: The Fed governor said inflation has expanded beyond the often-cited drivers such as the energy price spike in tariffs.

items.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman spar on X after Apple files OpenAI lawsuit
items.description: Sam Altman insisted that Elon Musk was again obsessed with him because of an OpenAI model release earlier this week.

items.title: This tech stock just got another Wall Street boost. Why we're on the same page
items.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

items.title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
items.description: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost more than $50 billion.

items.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
items.description: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

items.title: The 10 best state economies in America in 2026
items.description: Economy is one of the most important categories in CNBC’s annual America’s Top States for Business rankings. Several states stand out for economic strength.

items.title: The 10 worst state economies in America in 2026
items.description: Economy is a key category in CNBC’s America’s Top States for Business study, and some states stand out for the wrong reasons.

items.title: Big banks poised to report booming revenue propelled by SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility
items.description: Big banks are set to report booming Q2 revenue as the SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility and a rebound in commercial lending fuel Wall Street's "sweet spot."

items.title: AI is changing older workers' careers, research finds — here's how
items.description: AI may either prompt some older workers to leave their jobs or help make their roles more efficient, research finds. Here's which careers may be most affected.

items.title: Who will replace Lindsey Graham in the Senate?
items.description: South Carolina GOP Rep. Nancy Mace and Gov. Henry McMaster are among the first to be floated for the Senate seat vacated by Lindsey Graham.

items.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
items.description: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.
